div.p: Contiguous allocated region divided into fixed-size blocks with intrusive free list

ol.li: Contiguous Region: Single aligned_alloc() call reserves all memory upfront.
Fixed Block Size: All blocks identical size (64 bytes, aligned to max_align_t).
Intrusive Free List: Next pointer stored INSIDE free block (zero overhead).
O(1) Operations: Allocation = pop from head, Deallocation = push to head.
Pointer Overwrite: When allocated, user data occupies the space where next was.
return block → User owns all 64 bytes
